## Test plan

<!-- How did you verify this works? If you tested against a live ProLine tenant, redact all IDs and keys. -->

- [ ] Ran `python3 scripts/init-db.py` on a fresh checkout — no errors
- [ ] Linted or ran scripts touched by this PR
- [ ] Updated `tests/test-log.md` with the endpoint(s) / behavior verified

## Sensitive data check

- [ ] No API keys, partner keys, or company keys in the diff
- [ ] No real customer names, emails, phone numbers, or addresses
- [ ] No tenant-specific IDs (stage IDs, user IDs) hard-coded
